prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small green metal cube
  - obj_1: large red metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small green metal sphere
  - obj_3: small cyan rubber cube
  - obj_4: small yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_6: large gray rubber cube
  - obj_7: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_8: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small blue rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0341] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0342] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0343] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0344] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0345] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0346] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0347] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0348] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0349] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0350] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0351] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0352] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0353] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0354] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0355] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0356] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0357] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0358] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0359] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0360] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in each of the four scene images. Let me carefully examine each image and the objects within them.

Looking at the images, I need to identify which image corresponds to which set of objects (obj_0 through obj_9) and calculate distances.

The questions all reference obj_0 through obj_9 as listed:
- obj_0: small green metal cube
- obj_1: large red metal cylinder
- obj_2: small green metal sphere
- obj_3: small cyan rubber cube
- obj_4: small yellow metal cylinder
- obj_5: small cyan rubber sphere
- obj_6: large gray rubber cube
- obj_7: large yellow metal sphere
- obj_8: large red rubber cylinder
- obj_9: small blue rubber sphere

Looking at the fourth image (bottom right) which seems to contain all these objects, let me estimate 3D positions:

- obj_0 (green metal cube): back-left area
- obj_1 (red metal cylinder): front-left, large
- obj_2 (green metal sphere): middle area
- obj_3 (cyan cube): middle-front
- obj_4 (yellow metal cylinder): front-right
- obj_5 (cyan sphere): front-right, far
- obj_6 (gray cube): right side
- obj_7 (yellow metal sphere): front
- obj_8 (red rubber cylinder): middle-left
- obj_9 (blue sphere): middle

Now estimating distances:

obj_1 to obj_7: large red cylinder to yellow sphere - both in front area, moderate distance
obj_3 to obj_4: cyan cube to yellow cylinder - moderate distance
obj_3 to obj_5: cyan cube to cyan sphere - moderate distance
obj_3 to obj_6: cyan cube to gray cube - moderate distance
obj_3 to obj_8: cyan cube to red rubber cylinder - small distance
obj_3 to obj_9: cyan cube to blue sphere - moderate distance
obj_4 to obj_5,6,8,9: various distances
obj_5 to obj_6,8: various
obj_6 to obj_8,9: various
obj_8 to obj_9: moderate

obj_1 to obj_8: red metal cylinder to red rubber cylinder - both red cylinders, moderate distance

Let me make my best estimates:
